fields.label: Public Key
fields.helpText: From Langfuse -> Settings -> API Keys. The pk-lf-... value.

fields.label: Secret Key
fields.helpText: From Langfuse -> Settings -> API Keys, paired with the public key. The sk-lf-... value.

fields.label: Host
fields.helpText: Defaults to EU cloud (cloud.langfuse.com). Use https://us.cloud.langfuse.com for US, or your self-hosted URL.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates the public/secret key pair via the projects endpoint (Basic auth)

metadata.summary: Langfuse open-source LLM engineering platform — tracing, evals, prompt management, and cost/latency analytics for LLM apps.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Open Langfuse (cloud.langfuse.com or your self-hosted instance) and select your project
2. Go to Settings -> API Keys
3. Click 'Create new API keys'
4. Copy the Public Key (pk-lf-...) and Secret Key (sk-lf-...)
5. Paste both here, and set Host if you use US cloud or self-hosting
